title: Pyrrhocactus paucicostatus
taxonomy: Pyrrhocactus paucicostatus is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family (Cactaceae) within the subfamily Opuntioideae. It belongs to the genus Pyrrhocactus, which is a group of cacti found in South America. The classification of Pyrrhocactus paucicostatus includes its kingdom as Plantae, its phylum as Magnoliophyta, and its class as Magnoliopsida. The plant's order is Caryophyllales, and its family is Cactaceae. Further classification includes its genus as Pyrrhocactus and its species as P. paucicostatus.
